creator: maho@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repocopy

ports/editors/openoffice.org-2-devel to ports/editors/openoffice.org-vcltesttool

The reason is:
I'd like to add VCLTestTool for OpenOffice.org. This tool performs
automated tests for OpenOffice.org.

VCLtesttool should be from very old OpenOffice.org; SRC680_m226;
openoffice.org-2-devel port (I committed at 2007/8/26).

Therefore, repocopy is the natual way to remove openoffice.org-2-devel port
and alive again as openoffice.org-vcltesttool port.
